title: Healthcare Resource Management System
description: A full-stack healthcare management system built using Spring Boot and MySQL with role-based authentication, REST APIs, blood inventory management, donor recommendation, and emergency resource allocation workflows.

title: Smart Traffic Management System
description: An AI-powered traffic monitoring system using YOLOv8, OpenCV, Tesseract OCR, and Flask for real-time vehicle detection, number plate recognition, accident detection, triple riding detection, and intelligent traffic optimization.

title: Offline UPI Payment System
description: An offline-first UPI payment system designed using peer-to-peer mesh communication with secure encryption, transaction validation, and idempotency handling to ensure reliable offline digital payments.
